text: S.-T. Yau College Student Mathematics Contests 2011
Individual 2:30–5:00 pm, July 10, 2011 (Please select 5 problems to solve)
For the following problems, every example and statement must be backed up by proof. Examples and statements without proof will receive no-credit.
1. Let $K = \mathbb { Q } ( { \sqrt { - 3 } } )$ , an imaginary quadratic field.

list_items: (a) Does there exists a finite Galois extension $L / \mathbb { Q }$ which contains $K$ such that $\operatorname { G a l } ( L / \mathbb { Q } ) \cong S _ { 3 } { } ^ { * }$ ? (Here $S _ { 3 }$ is the symmetric group in 3 letters.)

(b) Does there exists a finite Galois extension $L / \mathbb { Q }$ which contains $K$ such that $\operatorname { G a l } ( L / \mathbb { Q } ) \cong \mathbb { Z } / 4 \mathbb { Z } ^ { \mathfrak { \cdot } }$ ?

(c) Does there exists a finite Galois extension $L / \mathbb { Q }$ which contains $K$ such that $\operatorname { G a l } ( L / \mathbb { Q } ) \cong Q \mathrm { : }$ ? Here $Q$ is the quaternion group with 8 elements $\{ \pm 1 , \pm i , \pm j , \pm k \}$ , a finite subgroup of the group of units $\mathbb { H } ^ { \times }$ of the ring $\mathbb { H }$ of all Hamiltonian quaternions.

text: 2. Let $f$ be a two-dimensional (complex) representation of a finite group $G$ such that 1 is an eigenvalue of $f ( \sigma )$ for every $\sigma \in G$ . Prove that $f$ is a direct sum of two one-dimensional representations of $G$ 1
3. Let $F \subset \mathbb { R }$ be the subset of all real numbers that are roots of monic polynomials $f ( X ) \in \mathbb { Q } [ X ]$ .

list_items: (2) Show that the only field automorphisms of $F$ are the identity automorphism $\alpha ( x ) = x$ for all $x \in F$ .

text: 4. Let $V$ be a finite-dimensional vector space over $\mathbb { R }$ and $T : V  V$ be a linear transformation such that

list_items: (1) the minimal polynomial of $T$ is irreducible;
(2) there exists a vector $v \in V$ such that $\{ T ^ { \ i } v \mid i \geq 0 \}$ spans $V$

text: Show that $V$ contains no non-trivial proper $T$ -invariant subspace.

of Abelian groups, such that (i) both rows are exact sequences and (ii) every vertical map, except the middle one, is an isomorphism. Show that the middle map $C  C ^ { \prime }$ is also an isomorphism.
6. Prove that a group of order 150 is not simple.
